test_cases.title: Legacy artifact directories are removed
test_cases.description: Verify that none of the Aitri v1.x pipeline directories exist in the repository after the stabilization commit.
test_cases.expected_result: git ls-files on docs/discovery, docs/plan, docs/delivery, docs/policy, docs/verification, specs/approved, backlog/zombite returns empty output

test_cases.title: FR-STB-001 edge case — partial state
test_cases.description: Verify FR-STB-001 requirement holds when only some expected files or fields are present.
test_cases.expected_result: Requirement FR-STB-001 is still met under partial conditions.

test_cases.title: FR-STB-001 negative — requirement not met
test_cases.description: Verify that the acceptance criteria for FR-STB-001 would fail if the change were reverted.
test_cases.expected_result: Acceptance criteria for FR-STB-001 is not satisfied if the artifact is absent or incorrect.

test_cases.title: Stale docs/ files are removed
test_cases.description: Verify that CANVAS_PURE_MIGRATION_PLAN.md, RELEASE_NOTES_V2.md, and CHECKPOINT_*.md files are absent from docs/.
test_cases.expected_result: None of docs/CANVAS_PURE_MIGRATION_PLAN.md, docs/RELEASE_NOTES_V2.md, or any docs/CHECKPOINT_*.md file exists in the repository working tree

test_cases.title: FR-STB-002 edge case — partial state

test_cases.expected_result: Requirement FR-STB-002 is still met under partial conditions.

test_cases.expected_result: Acceptance criteria for FR-STB-002 is not satisfied if the artifact is absent or incorrect.

test_cases.title: README.md describes current architecture
test_cases.description: README.md contains a setup section (npm install, npm run dev), a directory structure section, and an architecture section listing GameScene, gameRules.js, AudioManager, and src/locale/ui.js as named components.
test_cases.expected_result: README.md contains all required sections and named components with no references to removed files

test_cases.title: 02_SYSTEM_DESIGN.md documents AudioManager and ui.js
test_cases.description: 02_SYSTEM_DESIGN.md contains a component entry for src/audio/AudioManager.js with its initialization contract, and a component entry for src/locale/ui.js with its exports description.
test_cases.expected_result: 02_SYSTEM_DESIGN.md contains named sections for AudioManager and src/locale/ui.js, each with responsibility and interface description

test_cases.title: 01_REQUIREMENTS.json FR-006 has AudioManager note
test_cases.description: 01_REQUIREMENTS.json parsed as JSON; FR-006 contains an implementation_notes field referencing src/audio/AudioManager.js and src/locale/ui.js.
test_cases.expected_result: JSON.parse succeeds; FR-006.implementation_notes exists and references AudioManager; FR count is exactly 7

test_cases.title: FR-STB-005 edge case — partial state
test_cases.description: Verify FR-STB-005 requirement holds when only some expected files or fields are present.
test_cases.expected_result: Requirement FR-STB-005 is still met under partial conditions.

test_cases.title: FR-STB-005 negative — requirement not met
test_cases.description: Verify that the acceptance criteria for FR-STB-005 would fail if the change were reverted.
test_cases.expected_result: Acceptance criteria for FR-STB-005 is not satisfied if the artifact is absent or incorrect.

test_cases.title: AudioManager construction does not throw
test_cases.description: Import AudioManager from src/audio/AudioManager.js and construct it with a Phaser time stub. Verify it does not throw and that audioContext is null before ensure() is called.
test_cases.expected_result: new AudioManager({ addEvent: () => {} }) succeeds; instance.audioContext === null; instance.muted === false

test_cases.title: UI locale exports required string keys
test_cases.description: Import UI from src/locale/ui.js and verify it exports a plain object with string values and at least the required overlay keys.
test_cases.expected_result: typeof UI === 'object'; all values are strings; startTitle, startButton, pauseContinueButton, levelCompleteNextButton all exist and are non-empty

test_cases.title: getDifficultyProfile returns correct shape for level 1
test_cases.description: Call getDifficultyProfile(1) and verify the return object contains all required numeric fields including spawnIntervalMinMs, maxZombiesSimultaneous, and fastZombieChance.
test_cases.expected_result: Returns plain object with spawnIntervalMinMs=1200, maxZombiesSimultaneous=4, fastZombieChance=0.1, routeVariation=false

test_cases.title: getDifficultyProfile escalates threat from level 1 to level 5
test_cases.description: Call getDifficultyProfile(1) and getDifficultyProfile(5); verify that level 5 has higher fastZombieChance and maxZombiesSimultaneous >= level 1.
test_cases.expected_result: p5.fastZombieChance > p1.fastZombieChance; p5.maxZombiesSimultaneous >= p1.maxZombiesSimultaneous

test_cases.title: getDifficultyProfile level 10 returns horde parameters
test_cases.description: Call getDifficultyProfile(10) and verify it returns maxZombiesSimultaneous=7, spawnIntervalMinMs=1100.
test_cases.expected_result: maxZombiesSimultaneous=7, maxCiviliansSimultaneous=5, spawnIntervalMinMs=1100, spawnIntervalMaxMs=1300

test_cases.title: npm test passes with ≥27 tests
test_cases.description: After all stabilization changes, npm test exits 0 and the output shows at least 27 passing tests.
test_cases.expected_result: exit code 0; pass count >= 27; fail count = 0

test_cases.title: E2E: fresh clone setup flow completes in 5 minutes
test_cases.description: From a clean clone, run npm install && npm run dev and verify the game server starts successfully at localhost:5173 within 5 minutes.
test_cases.expected_result: npm run dev exits without error and the server is accessible at http://127.0.0.1:5173/

test_cases.title: E2E: full test suite passes on a clean install
test_cases.description: From a clean clone, run npm ci && npm test and verify all tests pass with exit code 0.
test_cases.expected_result: npm test exits 0, all 27+ tests pass, no behavioral assertions fail.

test_plan.strategy: Validate stabilization changes: repo hygiene (file deletions), documentation accuracy, and behavioral test coverage for extracted modules.
